_comment_1: Permissions for spawned session agents — not the orchestrator or your main Claude Code agent.
_comment_2: Allow is broad (Bash(*) + all tools). The deny list is the real boundary.
_comment_3: Bash deny rules are best-effort (prefix-matched, so 'cd /tmp && git push' bypasses 'Bash(git push*)'). Real security comes from worktree isolation and tool-level denies like Read(./.env*).
